raw_consumer_statement: I made a purchase for a sneaker shoe on XXXX XXXX the post claimed the shoes were delivered but I have not received them. I contacted Macys within the time frame of the delivery and to date I have not been offered a credit. XXXX representative said the credit would be applied back in XX/XX/2024 to date that hasnt happened. The amount of {$86.00} remains and Macys telling me that I should file a police report. In addition, I have made several payments and still my balance remains unchanged.
